summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HappyCo Concierge production hardening. Frontend implementation is solid with excellent UX, but backend resident data setup prevents booking functionality from working. All authentication, navigation, and UI components working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 'Resident not found' when creating bookings - resident record missing from database
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all resident booking functionality despite frontend being fully implemented
critical_bugs.details: User exists in users collection but no corresponding record in residents collection with retention credit data

data_issues.issue: Alex Chen user (0c7b51d0-f5eb-4e3b-88d8-7474c95fe157) exists as user but not as resident record
data_issues.impact: Session shows retention_credit: null, booking API fails

integration_issues.issue: Credit shows $0 instead of $35 due to backend data issue
integration_issues.note: Frontend properly handles null credit data, shows $0 gracefully

passed_tests: All 3 role logins (admin, manager, resident) working perfectly
Sign-out reliability excellent - proper redirects and session clearing
Navigation stability - sidebar remains visible, no UI errors
Booking dialog opens and form interactions work correctly
Services page displays all 9 'Book Now' buttons
Resident dashboard loads with proper credit section (shows $0 due to data issue)
Manager churn risk page shows Alex Chen with correct $35 credit references
Demo-safe error handling working (no technical errors shown to users)
Cross-role authentication restrictions working (manager can't access admin endpoints)
UI components and styling are clean and professional
All frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_percentage.backend: 80% (auth working, booking API blocked by data issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all UI working, credit display affected by backend data)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Create resident record for Alex Chen (user ID: 0c7b51d0-f5eb-4e3b-88d8-7474c95fe157) in residents collection with proper retentionCredit field containing amount: 35, originalAmount: 35, usedAmount: 0, reason: 'Retention reward', expiresAt: 4 days from now. This will enable the complete booking flow to work.
